issue: interface.defaultPrompt contains 4 entries while the observed CLI warning says a maximum of 3 prompts is supported
fix_not_performed_reason: The gate allowed automatic fixes for malformed JSON/TOML/YAML or stale path references. This is a schema compatibility issue in a Codex-local plugin cache, so Tim approval is required before editing.

proposed_fix.edit_scope: Only edit interface.defaultPrompt in the affected plugin manifest.
proposed_fix.change: Reduce interface.defaultPrompt from 4 entries to the first 3 entries.

exact_tim_approval_text: Tim approves backing up and editing only C:\Users\codex-agent\.codex\plugins\cache\openai-primary-runtime\template-creator\26.630.12135\.codex-plugin\plugin.json to reduce interface.defaultPrompt from 4 entries to the first 3 entries, with no auth, credential, API key, endpoint, token, account, install, network, product repo, canonical NWR, push, merge, deploy, migration, PrivateLens, all-fleet, or background-runner changes. After the edit, run parser/help diagnostics only. Do not run a real codex exec worker retry unless separately approved.
